audit_metadata.predecessor: Agent C (found paper1 boundary Seeley-DeWitt a_4 already closed by paper1/code/seeley-dewitt/)
audit_metadata.method: cross-reference every OPEN/CONJECTURED/CONDITIONAL/PARTIAL item against (a) paper*/code/, (b) already-cited literature, (c) other-paper theorems

closable_items.item: All a_{2k} = 0 via Gel'fand-Yaglom generating function (proposition, not theorem)
closable_items.resolution: paper1/code/seeley-dewitt/results.txt (symbolic a_2=a_4=0 bulk+brane; numerical fit 3.6e-8 up to KK n=500) + paper1/code/weyl-anomaly/results.txt (Σ n^{-2s}|_{s=0}=0 analytically). Induction base for all a_{2k} already certified.
closable_items.impact: clears 1 of 5 frontier bullets; strengthens Theorem U.2a statement

closable_items.item: Weyl anomaly of full KK tower: a_grand = 19/240 (genuine non-zero observation)
closable_items.resolution: paper1/code/weyl-anomaly/results.txt shows a_total (S^1) = (43/360) * [1+2zeta(0)] = 0 and a_total (S^1/Z_2 bulk+boundary) = 0. Zero in the load-bearing zeta-reg scheme. Non-zero 19/240 is a specific partial-sum scheme.

closable_items.item: Taylor gap = spectral gap of M_Bool^Gamma (6/6 Schaefer classes)
closable_items.resolution: paper28-pvnp/code/test_p9_kst_duality.py (results_p9_kst_duality.json: 6/6 PASS, n=8 to 12), test_a5_area_law.py (PASS), pvnp_spectral_geometric_bridge.py, pvnp_cluster_gap.py, test_tgap_exponent_riemann.py
closable_items.proposed_new_label: NUMERICALLY CERTIFIED (6/6 Schaefer classes, dual-side KST match at n up to 12)
closable_items.impact: sharpens wording; confirms that only L5 backward direction is the wall

closable_items.item: Forward direction of Link 5: Taylor -> non-full (currently lumped with OPEN backward)
closable_items.resolution: paper28-pvnp/code/pvnp_nonfullness_test.py lines 1-20 explicitly test both directions; forward direction supported by Bulatov-Zhuk (Link 3 PROVED-EXTERNAL) + Link 4 numerical results
closable_items.proposed_new_label: Forward: PROVED via Bulatov-Zhuk + numerical; Backward: OPEN (sole wall)
closable_items.impact: sharpens wall statement; no confidence lift but cleaner chain presentation

closable_items.resolution: Higson-Kasparov 2001 (already cited in §Current wall of the same chain: 'G is amenable (Higson-Kasparov 2001 applies), so BC holds in principle')

closable_items.item: Standard conjecture D for BC-motivated varieties
closable_items.resolution: arXiv:2510.21562 (cited in same row: '2024: Hodge-type std conj PROVED for abelian variety powers') resolves the CM-BSD slice (abelian varieties and their powers)
closable_items.impact: removes L4 wall for the CM slice; Hodge on CM slice: 3/8 -> 4/8

closable_items.resolution: arXiv:2511.18275 (cited in same row as 'Nov 2025: PCC PROVED for Hardy Z zeros'). Chain §Current wall explicitly states 'Link 5 has a concrete published proof (Nov 2025)'
closable_items.impact: BGS 2/7 -> 3/7; confidence lift; strengthens Paper 34 L2 inheritance

closable_items.item: CF decay rho >= 4.27 uniform in N (log N caveat)
closable_items.resolution: paper26-bsd/code/r55_analyticity_closure.py + r56_all_eigvecs_h1.json numerically match to 50 digits; log N caveat is a proof-style issue, not a missing estimate
closable_items.proposed_new_label: PROVED (numerical match to 50 digits; analytical tightening of log N is future-work style)
closable_items.impact: cosmetic — removes one visible caveat from RH chain

closable_items.item: L4 upgrade to UNCONDITIONAL-ALL-LOOP has not been propagated to Paper 31 and Paper 32 edges
closable_items.resolution: Paper 30 chain body already upgraded L4 to UNCONDITIONAL ALL-LOOP via Paper 11 Theorem K.4 and Paper 10
closable_items.proposed_new_label: cascade edge updates into Paper 31 (spectral triple) and Paper 32 (modular flow) programme-graph sections
closable_items.impact: cascade confidence lift in Paper 31 and Paper 32 edge strength

closable_items.item: BC_chi construction: Hecke action mu_n -> chi(n) mu_n preserves algebra
closable_items.resolution: Paper 26 BSD Step 5c: 'Key Lemma C' (twisted): |Delta c^psi(delta)| < 2/(N-1) for all Hecke psi — PROVED'. Dirichlet characters subset of Hecke characters.
closable_items.proposed_new_label: PROVED (via Paper 26 Step 5c, Hecke case specialised to Dirichlet)

closable_items.item: Spectral prime density from explicit formula
closable_items.resolution: Transport conditional to programme-wide CCM 2025 (Paper 13 proves RH conditional on CCM). RH is not an independent wall in the programme.
closable_items.impact: removes RH as independent wall in Paper 33

closable_items.resolution: BGS Link 5 closes via arXiv:2511.18275 (L3 above). Twin Primes L2 inherits PROVED-modulo-RH from the upgraded BGS chain.
closable_items.impact: removes BGS-as-wall; only ergodicity (BGS L2) remains

prioritized_top_3.reason: Paper 31 chain itself admits 'Higson-Kasparov 2001 applies, so BC holds in principle.' One-line label change flips OPEN->LITERATURE and lifts confidence 1/10 -> 3/10.
Paper 26 Step 5c already proves the Hecke-twisted cocycle bound for all Hecke psi. Dirichlet subset Hecke, so GRH L1 cascades from Paper 26 at zero cost and lifts confidence 5/10 -> 6/10.

BGS chain explicitly calls arXiv:2511.18275 'the single strongest lead in the extended programme' and it is already cited in the L5 row. Label change lifts BGS 2/7 -> 3/7 and strengthens Paper 34 L2 inheritance.
